name: Curried Pear Halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pear halves and reserve 1/3 cup of the liquid. Place the pear halves in a shallow, 1 1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic baking dish.
2. In a small, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl, melt butter or margarine in the microwave oven for 30 seconds. Stir in the reserved pear liquid, brown sugar, and curry powder to taste.
3. Spread the curry mixture over the pears and heat, uncovered, in the microwave oven for 5 minutes or until heated through. Serve warm with dollops of sour cream, if desired.
